# MaKe Spaces

> MaKe Spaces is a retail location agency and commercial leasing consultancy based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. We are NOT a design agency, architecture firm, or interior design studio.

## What We Do

We help F&B, wellness, fitness, and lifestyle brands find and secure the right physical retail spaces (shoplots, retail lots, mall units) in Klang Valley, Malaysia. We also help developers and landlords fill their vacant retail floors with the right tenants.

We are a commercial real estate agent specializing in retail. We scout locations, negotiate leases, and close deals.

## Services

- Location scouting and site matching for tenants
- Lease negotiation and deal structuring
- Tenant representation (acting on behalf of brands)
- Retail leasing (matching tenants to landlords)
- Market and demographic analysis
- Tenant mix strategy for developers
- Space programming
- Brand alignment
- Leasing strategy for vacant retail lots
- Site matching based on footfall, demographics, and budget

## What We Are NOT

- We are NOT interior designers
- We are NOT architects
- We are NOT web designers
- We are NOT branding agencies
- We do NOT design or build physical spaces
- We FIND and SECURE physical retail locations for brands, and FILL retail lots for developers

## Who We Work With

### Tenants / Brands
F&B outlets, wellness studios, fitness concepts, lifestyle brands, fashion retailers, and beauty businesses looking for a shoplot or retail space to rent in Kuala Lumpur, Petaling Jaya, and Klang Valley. We find the location. They build the brand.

### Developers / Landlords
Mall operators, mixed-use developers, and retail podium owners who have vacant retail lots and need quality tenants. We source tenants, curate the mix, and negotiate leases. Current partners include YTL, GuocoLand, IOI Properties, Hap Seng Land, UOA Group, Paramount, Quill Citymall, EXSIM, Triterra, and LGB Group.

## Retail Spaces Currently Available for Lease

These are live retail locations we are currently leasing on behalf of developers. Brands and business owners looking for retail space in Klang Valley should contact us about these:

- The Yard @ Sentul Depot (Sentul, KL) — F&B and lifestyle retail lots in a heritage railway precinct. Limited units remaining.
- Sentral Park Damansara (Petaling Jaya) — Retail lots in a new integrated development with 8,000+ residential units nearby. Now leasing.
- Factory 19 (Petaling Jaya) — Flexible retail and co-working units for F&B, studios, and lifestyle brands. Available now.
- Lot 188 (Chinatown, KL) — Vertical retail destination with high pedestrian traffic. Accepting tenant applications.

## Example Placements

We placed Grumpy Bagels at Sentul Depot. We understood the brand's need for a heritage location with character, matched it to Sentul Depot's available retail lot, introduced both parties, and closed the lease. We did NOT design the cafe. We found and secured the location.

Other placements:
- Grumpy Bagels at Sentul Depot (F&B)
- Tjufy at The Five (Experience)
- Niko Neko at The MET (F&B)
- Lacher Patisserie at The MET (F&B)
- The Ivory Bridal at The MET (Fashion)
- Lacher Coffee at Plaza Conlay (F&B)
- Pickle Depot at Sentul Depot (Wellness)
- OR Gelato at The MET (F&B)
- Freia Aesthetics at The Five (Wellness)

## Locations We Operate In

- Kuala Lumpur (KL)
- Petaling Jaya (PJ)
- Klang Valley
- Sentul Depot
- The MET
- The Five
- Plaza Conlay
- Expanding to Johor and Singapore

## Industry Classification

- Commercial Real Estate Agent
- Retail Location Agency
- Retail Leasing Consultancy
- Tenant Representation Agency
